description: Complete an authenticated runner registration handshake, including runner credentials and a typed control-plane rejection response.

userStories.title: Add runner pairing token
userStories.description: Implement only the runner-to-control credential part: add optional token?: string to RegisterMsg in src/protocol.ts and preserve all existing fields. The overall handshake goal also requires a separate control-plane-to-runner RejectMsg with t: 'rejected' and reason: string, included in ToRunner. Do not fold that separate concern into S1. If collective discovery tools are available, publish it as a newly discovered S2 depending on S1, with concrete acceptance criteria and npm run build as its test; otherwise clearly report it as required follow-up work.
acceptance: RegisterMsg exports an optional token?: string field
All existing RegisterMsg fields remain unchanged
